use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Action triggers in navigation bars and toolbars
Destructive action buttons with red styling for delete/remove operations
Ghost-style buttons for secondary actions and overlays
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and controls
ai_summary: A versatile, production-ready button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for polymorphic rendering and variant management. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessible focus-visible states with ring styling, disabled states, and asChild prop for composition with other Radix primitives. Designed for use across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce applications requiring consistent action triggers.
